description: Added Base Mainnet (chainId 8453) Basename support to ENS SDK and agent setup files

description: Evaluated Uniswap AI skills (5 plugins from Uniswap/uniswap-ai), adapted for Agent Zero. Created skill at /a0/usr/skills/uniswap-trading-api/SKILL.md combining uniswap-trading + uniswap-viem plugins. Key decision: Use Trading API (REST) over SDK for swap integration - handles routing, gas estimation, Permit2 automatically. Novel contribution: trust-gated swaps where agent reputation determines limits (max amount, slippage, allowed pairs).

details.prize_requirements: Must use Uniswap API for token swaps, real v4 on Base transactions, autonomous settlement, MANDATORY FEEDBACK.md

description: WP8 Implementation: Real 0G Storage/Compute integration + wallet module

files_created: sdk/zerog.ts (609 lines, real 0G Storage + Compute SDK integration)

zerog: ZeroGComputeClient: inference with TEE verification via @0glabs/0g-serving-broker
ZeroGClient: combined high-level client with storeJSON, storeAgentLog, storeInteractionResult
createZeroGClient factory with env var defaults
CJS interop via require() for packages without type declarations
StorageRef interface backward-compatible with original stub
wallet: signTransaction with auto gas estimation and receipt waiting
6-chain support: Base, Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, BSC
viem-based (NOT ethers), cached wallet/public clients per chain
